contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 150
- Description: Repackaging settlement: full pipeline execution + SOP + plan v3
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/634
  
  Details:
  Executed the complete repackaging settlement pipeline for batch b08d324b (Kirsten Ritschel, Oscar's Farm AGL4) and documented the process.
  
  What changed:
  - Verified QR batch b08d324b (3 ceremonial CC + 15 chocolate bar CB QRs)
  - Identified 4 dao_client gaps vs. post-repackaging cleanup
  - Created POST_REPACKAGING_CLEANUP_PLAN.md v3 — 24-file surface checklist across 8 layers, 9 PR spec, 16 gates, 9 UAT scenarios
  - Handed off to Sophia (thread 7987), debugged stale clone issue
  - Renamed event from POST-REPACKAGING CLEANUP EVENT → REPACKAGING SETTLEMENT EVENT across 4 repos (dao_client, dapp, truesight_me, agentic_ai_context)
  - Executed settlement event for Kirsten's batch via CLI → Edgar → Telegram
  - Debugged and fixed offchain transactions (column D numeric type issue)
  - Built and ran settlement processing script (6 transaction rows written)
  - Fixed SKU mapping (wrong IDs → correct organic-81-dark-chocolate-bar-50g-oscar-bahia-2024 and oscar-bahia-ceremonial-cacao-200g)
  - Rebuilt store-inventory.json — bars and ceremonial cacao now live on agroverse.shop
  - Expensed 4 tasting bars via [DAO Inventory Expense Event]
  - Wrote REPACKAGING_SETTLEMENT_SOP.md with SKU catalog, CLI template, verification checklist, and failure modes
  - Rebuilt inventory snapshot (bars now 10 after expense)
  
  Why:
  Every repackaging batch previously required ~20 min of manual gspread edits. The settlement event pipeline + SOP make this a single CLI command with automatic inventory propagation.
  
  Evidence:
  - GitHub PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/634
  - SOP: REPACKAGING_SETTLEMENT_SOP.md
  - Plan: POST_REPACKAGING_CLEANUP_PLAN.md
  - Sophia handoff: thread 7987
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
